An update from Equinix ( (EQIX) ) is now available.

On March 20, 2024, Equinix, Inc. received a subpoena from the SEC regarding a short seller report, followed by additional information requests. By November 19, 2025, the SEC concluded its investigation without recommending enforcement action. Similarly, a subpoena from the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Northern District of California related to the same report is not expected to result in further action.

On October 31, 2025, Mr. Ronggang Zhang resigned from the board of directors of NFT Limited for personal reasons, effective November 1, 2025. Subsequently, on November 18, 2025, Mr. Shuo (Cooper) Li was appointed as an Independent Director to fill the vacancy, taking on roles in the nominating and corporate governance committee, audit committee, and compensation committee. data.title: Nouveau Monde Graphite Releases Updated Feasibility Study for Matawinie Mine
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Nouveau Monde Mining ( (TSE:NOU) ) has shared an update.

On November 12, 2025, Nouveau Monde Graphite Inc. announced the results of an updated feasibility study for its Phase-2 Matawinie Mine, conducted in accordance with the National Instrument 43-101 standards. The study, which excluded the Phase 2 of the Bécancour Battery Material Plant, reaffirmed the technical and economic viability of the mine, projecting a 25-year life span with an annual processing rate of 2.56 million tonnes. The feasibility study highlighted a capital expenditure of US$421 million and an annual operating cost of US$44 million, with an after-tax internal rate of return of 15.8%. The study also identified potential risks related to construction productivity, equipment delivery times, and contractor bids, but noted the project’s resilience to variations in capital and operating costs.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NOU) stock is a Buy with a C$4.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nouveau Monde Mining stock, see the TSE:NOU Stock Forecast page.

data.title: MAIA Biotechnology Expands Phase 2 Study in Romania
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. ( (MAIA) ) has shared an announcement.

On November 20, 2025, MAIA Biotechnology announced that its CEO, Vlad Vitoc, presented the efficacy of their telomere-targeting agent, ateganosine, at the Smart Diaspora 2025 conference in Romania. The company has begun enrolling patients in Romania for the Phase 2 THIO-101 Part C study, which evaluates ateganosine as a treatment for advanced non-small cell lung cancer. This expansion aims to accelerate patient access to the therapy and strengthen MAIA’s strategy for accelerated approval in the U.S. The study has shown promising results, with a 38% response rate in third-line NSCLC patients, compared to the current treatment’s response rate of up to 6%.

The most recent analyst rating on (MAIA) stock is a Buy with a $14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. stock, see the MAIA Stock Forecast page.

More about MAIA Biotechnology, Inc.

MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in the development of targeted immunotherapies for cancer. The company’s lead program involves ateganosine (THIO), a telomere-targeting agent aimed at treating non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) in patients with telomerase-positive cancer cells.
